channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine conducts large-scale drone strikes on Russia, killing 4 and wounding 12 others
item.description: One of Ukraine's largest drone attacks on Russia killed at least four people, including three near Moscow, and injured a dozen others, local authorities said.

item.title: One clinic tracks the heavy toll Trump's immigration crackdown takes on mental health
item.description: Zocalo Health, a primary care provider, screens all patients for depression, anxiety and suicidal thoughts, noting a sharp rise in such symptoms.

item.title: CEO and Trump donor uses tariffs as a weapon against competitors
item.description: Cambria CEO Marty Davis successfully lobbied for U.S. tariffs on quartz, drawing complaints from business rivals.

item.title: Bus riders to Montgomery retrace old steps while fighting a new fight
item.description: Thousands gathered in Montgomery, Alabama, on Saturday to protest conservative states' efforts to redraw congressional districts.
